title: Understanding Automated Digital Product Delivery with Crypto: A Plain-Language Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling digital products online can be a daunting task for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, and other countries where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are restricted. You're not alone. Many of your peers face the same challenge: how to get paid for their ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and other digital products without the hassle of KYC requirements or expensive payment processor fees. This breakdown is for you, the creator who wants to take control of their sales and get paid in crypto without the headaches. Let's dive in and explore the world of automated digital product delivery with crypto – no PayPal required.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is a game-changer for creators like you who need to sell digital products online. It's a technology that allows you to sell ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and other digital products without the need for traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. This means you can reach a global audience, including customers in restricted countries, and get paid in their preferred cryptocurrency. It's a level playing field, where you can focus on creating and selling your products without worrying about payment processing limits or fees.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind automated digital product delivery with crypto is based on a robust backend engine, like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), that integrates with a payment processor like NOWPayments. When a customer makes a purchase, the backend engine automatically verifies the payment, generates a PDF receipt, and delivers the digital product to the customer's email. It's a seamless experience for both the creator and the customer, with no need for manual intervention or payment processor accounts.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Automated digital product delivery with crypto is built for creators who want to sell digital products online without the hassle of traditional payment processors. This includes writers, artists, designers, developers, and other professionals who need to get paid for their work in crypto. It's also ideal for solo developers who want to build a digital product store without the burden of payment processing fees or KYC requirements.
Automated digital product delivery with crypto gives you the freedom to sell your products online without traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To set up automated digital product delivery with crypto, you'll need a few key components: a digital product to sell, a payment processor like NOWPayments, a backend engine like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99), and a frontend wallet integration like Web3 Wallet Connect. These components work together seamlessly to provide a seamless experience for both the creator and the customer.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the ins and outs of automated digital product delivery with crypto, it's time to take action. Start by choosing a digital product to sell, such as an ebook or a course, and set up a payment processor like NOWPayments. Next, select a backend engine like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) and a frontend wallet integration like Web3 Wallet Connect. Finally, launch your store and start selling your digital products to a global audience.

How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal? To sell an ebook online without PayPal, you'll need to use a payment processor like NOWPayments and a backend engine like the Core Shop Engine ($49.99).
